zh.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough是John De Blainscough的女兒，於1316年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃辛頓。她於大約1335年與William De Worthington結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough was born in 1316, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John De Blainscough. She married William De Worthington about 1335. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1375, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough est née en 1316, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John De Blainscough. Elle a épousé William De Worthington environ 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1375, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough wurde 1316 in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von John De Blainscough geboren. Sie hat um 1335 William De Worthington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough è nata il nel 1316 nel Worthington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di John De Blainscough. Lei sposato William De Worthington circa 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1375, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscoughは1316年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスイントンでJohn De Blainscoughの娘として生まれた。約1335年にWilliam De Worthingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough(은)는 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 John De Blainscough의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 William De Worthington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel de Blainscough родилась в 1316 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John De Blainscough. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Worthington около 1335 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1375 г. в возрасте 59 лет.
